VaraLokalerPage.title: Our premises
VaraLokalerPage.info: Discover our premises by the water and out in the forest.

VaraLokalerCard.title: Myset
VaraLokalerCard.subtitle: Our scout cabin in the forest
VaraLokalerCard.p1: In the Lövstaskogarna between Lövsta and Gåseborg lies Myset. A warm, fresh, and well-equipped scout cabin with space for up to 40 people. Perfect for camps, hikes, and troop championships.
VaraLokalerCard.bookingDetail2: We are happy to rent out to scout troops, school classes, and other groups.
VaraLokalerCard.myset-info2: Electric and wood stove, dishwasher, microwave oven, large refrigerator, and coffee maker. Running cold and hot water from a private well 4 meters from the house.
VaraLokalerCard.myset-info4: Large gathering room with an open fireplace, new ventilation system, and radiators. Really warm and homely even during winter.
VaraLokalerCard.myset-info6: Located in the Lövsta forests near Kyrkhamn. The nature around the cabin offers outdoor life, hikes, and adventures right outside the door.
VaraLokalerCard.p2: The scout troop’s current clubhouse is located down by the water in Hässelby Strand.
VaraLokalerCard.p3: The house is used as a gathering place for the sea scouts and is close to boats and docks. According to the historical text, the building is owned by the adjacent Hässelbyverket, which has positively supported the youth activities.
VaraLokalerCard.p4: HSS has conducted sea scouting since 1959 and uses Ruffen as a base for meetings, sailing, and camp preparations.
VaraLokalerCard.ruffen-detail5: Down by the water Hässelby Strand, near docks and boats
